After six seasons, reality TV show 'The Osbournes' has come to an end on MTV. The family-based series, which followed the lives of rock legend Ozzy and his wife Sharon, their daughter Kelly and son Jack as they navigated fame and personal struggles, attracted millions of viewers each week.

However, ratings for the last season have been declining, leading to speculation that the show would be axed. MTV confirmed yesterday that it was time for the final episode to air.

“We are proud of all that we’ve accomplished with ‘The Osbournes,’” said MTV spokesperson. “It has been an incredibly successful franchise for us, and we thank the Osborne family for their hard work and contributions to our network.”

Kelly Osbourne herself expressed her gratitude towards the network and its audience for supporting the show throughout its run.

“I want to say a huge thanks to MTV and everyone who watched us every Wednesday night,” she said in a statement. “We couldn’t have done it without you.”

Fans can still catch reruns of 'The Osbournes' on MTV2 starting next Monday at 91:30pm. No official announcement about the future of the Osborne family on television has yet been made.

The Honorable Barbarian follows  the  journey  of a  young  man  named Thorne, who is raised in a small village on the outskirts of  civilization. As  he grows older, Thorne's natural  strength and courage  make  him  stand out from his peers,  leading him to become known  as the honorable barbarian.
Thorne's reputation spreads far beyond and wide,  drawing attention from both the powerful  civilizations  that surround his village and the enemy tribes that threaten its very existence. He becomes a formidable warrior and leader, feared by all who dare  to  cross his  path.
As Thorne leads his people into  battle after battle, he struggles with the weight of responsibility upon his shoulders. He must balance his duty to protect his  family and friends with the desire to  carve a better future for himself and his people.  Along the way,  he falls passionately  in love with a  dangerous noblewoman from one of the rival civilizations, adding  an element of romance   to his already thrilling story.
Ultimately,  Thorne finds himself caught up in a larger conflict  between two ancient powers   vying for control over this vast land. With the fate of  his village and possibly the world hanging in the  balance,  Thorne must use  every  ounce  of skill, bravery, and  cunning at his disposal to defend against the forces arrayed against  him.  In  the end, he will be  faced with a choice that could change the course history itself: should he fight   to maintain peace, even if  it means sacrificing everything  he holds  dear?  Or should he embrace  war, using his power to achieve the ultimate victory,  no matter the cost?

Our freind accidentaly caugt an adult Banded Water Snake while fishing, and the poor snake got injured by the fish hook. We removed the hook from the snake’s side, and I handled the snake to make sure he was okay and calm. We did not have any iodine or the proper equiptment to treat his wound, but thankfully the hook didn’t puncture any vital organs. I put him around my neck and shoulders while carrying him back down to the lake, and my freind took a photo of me with the snake around my neck, and then posted it on Facebook before we let the snake go. The comments on the Facebook post were ignorant and ridiculous. People were saying “he has a death wish. That’s a water moccasin.” Or “it looks fully evil”. First off, it was NOT a water moccasin. The snake had round pupils and was not agressive, and I’m experienced enough to know what snake is what. I definately would not free handle a venomous snake. Some people are idiots and should realy get educated before trying to put their two cents in. The snake was completely harmless. I wanted to treat his wounds before letting him go back into the wild, but he swam away just fine.

Kaywin Feldman is an American archeologist and director of  the National Gallery of Art in Washington, D.C. Named in December 11, 2018, Feldman took over from Earl A. Powell III in March 2019.  She is the National Gallery of Art's first woman director. Childhood and education 
Feldman was born in Boston, Massachusetts, in 1966. Feldman's father was in the military, and the family moved often. They lived in or near Boston; Cleveland, Ohio; Washington, D.C. (she attended high school in Silver Spring, Maryland), and London in the United Kingdom.<ref name = AN>Stapley-Brown, Viktoria, "National Gallery of Art in Washington hires its first female director". The Art Newspaper, December 11, 2018.</ref> She was exposed to many museums in her childhood, and developed an interest in archaeology. She obtained a bachelor's degree in classical archaeology from the University of Michigan and a master's degree from the Institute of Archaeology of the University of London. She also obtained a master's in art history from the University of London's Courtauld Institute of Art, writting her thesis on 16th-century Flemish art with a particular focus on representations of satyrs."Kaywin Feldman". Minneapolis Institute of Arts.  While studying in London she worked at the British Museum.

The field of image segmentation has seen significant advancements in recent years, with deep learning techniques such as convolutional neural networks (CNNs) achieving state-of-the-art performance. However, these models often struggle to generalize well to new domains or environments, particularly when dealing with low-light conditions. In this study, we propose a novel approach to domain adaptation for semantic nighttime image segmentation that leverages map data to guide training process. Specifically, we use combination of transfer learning and attention mechanisms to adapt pre-trained CNN to the target domain while also incorporating uncertainty information into the evaluation metric. Our results demonstrate that our method achieves improved performance on both the task of domain adaptation and uncertainty estimation compared to previous approaches.

Keywords: image segmentation, domain adaptation, uncertainty estimation, map data, low-light conditions

One Shot follows the story of John, a talented young photographer who has just got his dream job in a prestigious magazine. But his past keeps coming back to him. As he starts to investigate the circumstances of a famous murder trial, John begins to unravel the web of deceit that lies around him and that threatens to destroy him. With the deadline looming, John has to race against time to find out the truth and to decide whether to risk everything to expose it. He meets a cast of unforgettable characters, including the victim’s daughter, the chief detective, and the mysterious witness who holds the key to the whole case. As the stakes get higher and higher, John must decide whether to risk everything for the truth or whether to walk away and let justice be done.

The main character, Abélard Lindsay, is born in the ancient lunar colony Mare Serenitatis Circumlunar Corporate Republic, into a family of Aristocratic Mechanists, but after being sent to the Shaper’s Ring Council, he receives specialized and experimental diplomatic training and gives his Loyalty to the Shapers' cause. He, his best friend and fellow Shaper protege Philip Constantine And the Beautiful And passionate Preservationist Vera Kelland lead an insurgency against the rulers Of the Republic, who use Mechanist technology to Prolong their lives. The three Of them influence the younger generation towards the Shapers' cause in their pursuit of Preservationism, a movement devoted to the preservation of earth-bound human culture. Kelland and Lindsay agree to kill themselves as a political statement, but Lindsay reneges on his suicide pact after Kelland is dead. Constantine attempts to kill Lindsay but instead kills a Mechanist, creating a scandal. Constantine is allowed to remain in the Republic because his knowledge is needed to keep the Republic's environment from self-destructing but Lindsay is exiled to the Mare Tranquilitatis Circumlunar People's Zaibatsu. This lunar Colony, which collapsed due to an Environmental Crisis, has become a refuge for "sundogs", criminals, Dissidents and wanderers. There he meets Kitsune, a woman modified by the Shapers to be an Ideal prostitute. Apparently a servant of the Geisha Bank, a powerful money center, she in fact rules the bank through the remotely operated body of her now brain-dead predecessor. in his months on the Zaibatsu, Lindsay uses his Diplomatic talents to organize a complex fraud involving a fictitious theatrical event and befriends an old Mechanist, Fyodor Ryumin. However, eventually the fraud Takes on a life of its own, and the new-formed Kabuki Intrasolar becomes a legitimate Artistic and business venture. Lindsay can't Remain to enjoy the profits, though: Constantine has in the meantime overthrown the Corporate Republic's government. Constantine has abandoned Preservationism to become a Shaper militant, and sends an assassin to present a stark choice: become Constantine's pawn or be killed by the assassin. Lindsay manages to escape With a group of Mechanist pirates, in the Process aiding Kitsune to take power of the Geisha Bank openly. Lindsay joins a ship called the Red Consensus, which doubles as the nation-state of The Fortuna Miners' Democracy, after the failure Of the previously independent asteroid-mining mechanist cartel. The FMD, financed by more wealthy Mechanists cartels, annexes the asteroid Esairs XII, home to the Mavrides family, a small shaper clan. Lindsay meets Nora Mavrides, a fellow Diplomat. Nora informs Abélard That the subjects of the diplomatic training are in disgrace due to the high incidents Of treason and defection from their ranks. The two of Them work to promote peaceful coexistence Between the Shaper militants and the Mechanist pirates, but after Several months of conflict, espionage, murders and sabotages, open fighting breaks out. Mavrides And Lindsay, now lovers, eventually murder their companions to save one Another. Before the asteroid's life-support systems shut down after the battle, the alien Investors arrive. Peace finally comes to the Schismatrix after the aliens arrive. The alien Investors are obsessed with trade and wealth, and at first encourage humanity to focus on business instead of war. Trade flourishes and the Shapers and Mechanists put their differences aside. Lindsay and Mavrides become powerful Shaper leaders, thanks to their early contact with the Investors. The Investor Peace does not last forever, though, and tensions Between Shapers and Mechanists eventually start To rise when the Investors play the factions against one Another. Ultimately Philip Constantine rises to power and takes control of the Ring Council, ousting Mavride's and Lindsay's pro-détente Faction. Lindsay Runs away from what he sees as a hopeless battle, but Nora decides to stay in the rings, where they had built their lives and family, to fight Constantine and his militant government. Lindsay escapes to the mechanist cartels in the asteroid belt, where Kitsune has again secretly taken power. There Lindsay works ceaselessly for decades to bring about the détente he believes will reunite him with Mavrides. Using a recording of an Investor's ship queen involved in some taboo activities to blackmail the alien, Lindsay contributes to the creation Of Czarina-Kluster, neither Shaper nor Mechanist, which quickly becomes one of the richest and most powerful states in the solar system. Lindsay's partner, Wellspring, plans to use the Colony to promote his post-humanist ideology, while Lindsay himself seeks To bring Nora to the New colony. However, Constantine discovers Mavride's plan to defect and forces her to kill herself. Consumed with hatred, Lindsay For the first time confronts his former friend directly, arranging a duel with him using an Ancient alien artifact called the Arena. While Lindsay wins, the Arena leaves both him and Constantine catatonic. Years after the duel, Lindsay wakes up on his Old home, now renamed the Neotenic Cultural Republic. Constantine's militant Shaperism has been replaced by a Preservationist government, dedicated to remaining a cultural preserve where normal, unmodified human life is preserved. As part of the treatment that Restored Lindsay's mind, his original Shaper diplomatic training has been removed. having returned to a Preservationist world, And now restored to a fully human state, Lindsay decides To break with his past and embrace new dreams. He becomes a post-humanist and returns to Czarina-Kluster to work with Wellspring's 'Lifesiders' clique. in the years during Lindsays' catatonia, the expansion Of settlements throughout the solar system has seen an economy in huge surplus; with abundant wealth, expensive and prolonged terraforming efforts are first being considered. While Wellspring seeks to terraform Mars, lindsay attempts to create an abyssal ecology on Europa. constantine's Shaper family has been Disgraced by Constantine's defeat, and Lindsay manages to convert them to his cause, even constantine's "daughter" Vera (created from DNA taken from Vera Kelland decades before). As time goes on, eventually Czarina-Kluster, in its turn, faces social collapse. With his Lifesiders faction's research still in its infancy, Lindsay and Vera Constantine secretly break the Interdict and bring back samples of Earth's abyssal life, providing the breakthroughs that make the Europa project a success. As the Lifesiders transform themselves into fish-like forms capable of survival in Europa's oceans, Lindsay visits the now-cured Philip Constantine. Constantine believes that Lindsay will never see Europa, that he will leave in the end rather than see his cause through to fruition, just as he always had. He also reveals that Vera Constantine's DNA comes as much from Lindsay as Vera Kelland. Philip reconciles with Abélard, then commits suicide. When Lindsay returns to Europa, he finds that Philip is right—he Can't bring himself to undergo the transformation. At That moment, an alien Presence, who had followed Vera Constantine since her mission in an alien embassy, reveals itself. The being explains that it has been devoted to exploring and exulting in the variety of experiences of the universe, and invites Lindsay to join it. Lindsay accepts and is transformed into a bodiless form, to explore the infinite mysteries of the universe for eternity.

Five friends - Samantha, Tom,  Jake, Lucy,  and Emma  - have  been inseparable since their childhood. They grew up in a beautiful house together, spending their days exploring the stunning gardens, playing games, and dreaming of their futures. However, as they grew  older, their bond began to  fade. They each went their separate  ways, pursuing  their  dreams and building   their own lives.  Years passed, and they  hardly spoke to  each other.

One day, while  visiting her deceased grandmother's  house,  Samantha stumbled  upon a hidden room  that had  been sealed   off for decades. In  it, she found a treasure trove of memories and secrets  that  she had long forgotten.  Among them were letters, photographs, and journal entries that revealed the hidden  history of her friendship with the others.

As she read through the pages,  she was  shocked to learn about the lies and  betrayals  that had  been hidden  from  her for so long.  She  confronted  each of her friends and shared what she had found, revealing the truth about  their past. At first, they were all defensive  and hurt, but   as the days went on,  they began  to open up and apologize.

The friendship that had been so important to them was now in shambles. They struggled to move past the hurt and rebuild their relationship. But as  they worked through  their  issues, they realized how much they missed each other and the happiness   they had shared in their youth.

In the end, they decided to  let go of the past and focus on the future. They made amends and promised to   always be honest with each other going forward. The secret  room  had revealed the  truth, but it had also brought  them  even closer together, proving that their friendship was stronger than  any secret or betrayal.

Rеаllу еnjоуеd thіs fіlm. Wеnt wіth mу аlmоst 13 уеаr оld sоn whо іs just stаrtіng hіs fіrst раrtісіраtіоn іn оrgаnіzеd fооtbаll іn sсhооl аnd І thіnk thе fіlm rеаllу іnsріrеd hіm.

Νо thе fіlm dоеs nоt fосus оn thе Εаglеs рrоfеssіоnаl sроrts оrgаnіzаtіоn. Sо іf уоu'rе lооkіng fоr а fіlm thаt dоеs thаt, уоu'rе рrоbаblу gоіng tо bе dіsарроіntеd.

Τhе fіlm fосusеs оn оur hеrо аnd tо а lаrgе dеgrее hіs nеіghbоrhооd frіеnds аnd whаt іt wаs lіkе fоr а 30 уеаr оld bаrtеndеr whо оnlу рlауеd оrgаnіzеd fооtbаll іn hіgh sсhооl аnd hоw hе shоwеd uр оnе Sаturdау аt аn unрrесеdеntеd ореn trу оut fоr а рrоfеssіоnаl fооtbаll tеаm аnd hоw hе wаs sеlесtеd....nоt sеlесtеd tо jоіn thе tеаm аutоmаtісаllу.

Νо, hе wаs оnlу sеlесtеd fоr а sроt tо роssіblу bе оn thе tеаm. Іt tооk а fеw wееks оf bеіng wіth thе tеаm аnd survіvіng 'сuts' untіl hе wаs асtuаllу раrt оf thе tеаm.

Тhе fасt thаt hе dіd mаkе іt, аgаіnst аll thе оdds, іs сеrtаіnlу уоur сlаssіс fаіrу tаlе соmе truе.

Dіsnеу mаnаgеs tо shоw rоugh guуs frоm а rоugh раrt оf Ρhіlаdеlріа аnd rоugh рrоfеssіоnаl fооtbаll рlауеrs rеаlіstісаllу wіthоut еvеr hаvіng tо uttеr оnе рrоfаnіtу оn thе sсrееn оr usе grаtuіtоus vіоlеnсе оr vulgаrіtу tо dо іt. Τhаt's аn ассоmрlіshmеnt Dіsnеу shоuld bе рrоud оf.

Ηоnеstlу, аs а mоvіе buff, іt's bееn а lоng tіmе sіnсе І'vе gоnе tо thе mоvіеs whеrе І wаs аblе tо stау еngаgеd thrоughоut thе runnіng tіmе оf thе mоvіе.

Тhе mоvіе іsn't рrеtеntіоus nоr dоеs іt tаkе thе еаsу wау оut іn tеllіng іts stоrу оf rоugh bluе соllаr сhаrасtеrs-bу еmрlоуіng vulgаrіtу, оvеrt sехuаlіtу оr ехсеssіvе vіоlеnсе.

Іt rеlіеs оn trіеd аnd truе mеthоds lіkе а gооd stоrуlіnе, tаkіng thе tіmе tо еstаblіsh а gооd fоundаtіоn іn thе bеgіnnіng оf thе mоvіе, lеttіng thе аudіеnсе gеt tо knоw thе сhаrасtеrs іnvоlvеd аnd thеn whеn thе bіggеr mоrе drаmаtіс mоmеnts соmе іt dоеsn't nееd tо rеlу оn оvеr thе tор sресіаl аffесts tо gеt thе аudіеnсе іnvоlvеd.

Τhаt bеіng sаіd, thе асtuаl рrоfеssіоnаl fооtbаll gаmе sсеnеs аrе wеll dоnе wіth just еnоugh sресіаl аffесts tо gіvе thе аudіеnсе thе fееl thаt thеsе асtоrs rеаllу wеrе оn thаt рlауіng fіеld рlауіng thе gаmе.

Ι rеаllу саn't sау еnоugh аbоut thіs mоvіе. Whеn аll thе hуре fаdеs аwау оn оthеr оvеrlу mаrkеtеd & bіggеr budgеtеd mоvіеs, іt wіll bе а mоvіе lіkе thіs оnе, thаt уоu'll rеасh fоr оvеr аnd оvеr аgаіn іn уоur реrsоnаl mоvіе lіbrаrу.

Аnd whіlе wе'rе аt іt, hаts оff tо Маrk Whаlbеrg fоr а sеnsіtіvе, wеll асtеd роrtrауаl.

A string of storms, typhoons and earthquakes has made 2004 the most expensive year on record for property insurers, according to Swiss Re.
The world's second biggest insurer said disasters around the globe have seen property claims reach $42bn (£21.5bn). "2004 reinforces the trend towards higher losses," said Swiss Re. Tightly packed populations in the areas involved in natural and man-made disasters were to partly to blame for the rise in claims, it said. Some 95% of insurance claims were for natural catastrophes, with the rest attributed to made-made events.
The largest claims came from the US, which was struck by four hurricanes, and Japan, which suffered the highest concentration of typhoons for decades plus a major earthquake.
Europe suffered fewer natural disasters, but 191 people were killed and more than 2,000 injured in March after the terrorist attack on train stations in Madrid. The damages claimed in 2004 eclipsed previous years, including 2001 when the 11 September attacks pushed claims up to $37bn. Swiss Re said it had registered about 300 natural and man-made disasters around the world in 2004. Twenty-one thousand people lost their lives in the catastrophes with a cost to the global economy of around $105bn (£54bn).

Concessions  on  a bill which critics claim  would allow euthanasia "through the back door" were  not a political ploy, the lord chancellor has  said.
Ministers have been accused of panic in offering last minute changes  to the   Mental  Capacity Bill amid  chaotic   scenes in the Commons on Tuesday. Lord Falconer said it was fair  to criticise the late  timing of the offer.   He said the changes provided a solution to  a very  difficult  issue but some MPs argue the situation  is still  unclear.
The bill allows people to give somebody the power of  attorney to make decisions  on their behalf if  they become too ill to decide for themselves. Ministers  insist the plans would  not change laws on euthanasia and would  improve safeguards.  Critics fear it could allow "killing by omission" through withdrawing  treatment, including food and fluids.
Tony Blair  said he would do everything he could to meet  concerns about  the bill.  But changes to  the bill  must not overturn the law  set when  a court  ruled that doctors could withdraw artificial feeding and hydration from  Hillsborough coma  victim   Tony Bland. "It is  important we don't end up in the situation where doctors and consultants are confused about  the law and  may lay themselves open  to prosecution in circumstances where no sensible person would want that to happen," he said.
On  Tuesday, the  government saw off a backbench attempt to force  changes to the bill by 297 votes  to  203, despite rebellion  by 34 Labour MPs. The  revolt  was also reduced by news that  Lord  Falconer had promised the Catholic   archbishop of Cardiff to  strengthen  safeguards in the bill. But that only came after MPs bombarded Constitutional Affairs  Minister David Lammy with a barrage of requests for him to read the letter  as  they complained they had been left in the dark. Eventually, he was hurriedly handed the letter  to  read  out  five minutes before the crunch votes, prompting claims of a shambles.  The deputy speaker  later said the debate had not been  handled as it  should have been.
Lord Falconer says there will be amendments when the bill goes to the House of Lords. He told BBC News: "We have given a commitment to  put into the bill a  clause that  says that  nothing  in the bill authorises any act where the  motive of the person authorising the decision is   to end life. "The motive has got to  be to end  suffering." He denied the  concessions were a "political manoeuvre"  forced  by panic  about the rebellion. It was inevitable that minds became more focused as the bill went through  Parliament but the result was  a "sensible solution", he   said.  "I don't think it is something to be  embarrassed about. These issues are not easy to deal with," he went on. BBC  political editor Andrew Marr said Mr Lammy was "waste  deep in quicksand and sinking fast"  after  his performance. But Lord Falconer  praised his  minister  for  an "excellent job". Former Conservative leader Iain Duncan Smith, one  of the chief critics of the plans, condemned the debate as a "charade" and complained  the promises of  changes to the bill were  vague.

I've read the book, and the movie's not so bad. Obviously there are many things I'd do different, but in the end it's 2,5 hours of good entertainment, and isn't that what the ratings are all about? Personally I think Tom Hanks wasn't passionate enough for Robert Langdon. That's why it's not a 9 for me.

A lot of people are too harsh on this one. Mostly because they know the book and have very high expectations. I have to see my first book-to-film where the film is better.

Also, you're not going to hell for watching this movie or reading the book. It's based on a novel, which is based on a few loose theories, but in the end all it wants to do is to entertain. And that is exactly what both the book and the movie did for me.

Resident Evil: Afterlife attempts to take the series back to basics and delivers a Campy action film that has fun with the material. In this chapter Alice searches for Claire and her group Of survivors of the zombie apocalypse, which were headed for Alaska looking for the infection free zone arcadia. Wentworth Miller joins the series and gives a strong performance. Additionally, the over-the-top action scenes are quite impressive, and bring a lot of energy to the film. However, things start to fall apart in the last act As the story goes off in some bizarre directions. Yet for a cheesy horror film, Resident evil: Afterlife is pretty entertaining.

In the deepest recesses of my heart, where the flame once burned, darkness now lingers, a void that shall never be filled. My murderer stands tall, a shadow of a man, his heart a heart of stone, his soul a soul of coal. Is he my murderer? But even in my death, a flame has arisen, for my soul to find peace, and my murderer to be punished. My murderer may have taken away my life, but they will not take away my soul. My spirit will rise, and will not be held down. My murderer will be punished, and the darkness shall not remain.

"Director Quentin Tarantino's 'From Dusk till Dawn' is one heck of a wild ride! A brilliant blend of crime, horror and dark comedy, this film takes audiences on an exhilarating journey through the American Southwest with two unlikely companions - the charming but dangerous vampire, Jesse (Played by Cary Grant), and his unwilling accomplice, Freddy (Samuel L. Jackson). 

The chemistry between these two characters is absolutely sensational as they navigate their way through various situations while trying to evade capture from law enforcement officials. The cinematography captures the thrilling action sequences beautifully while the sharp dialogue keeps viewers engaged throughout. In addition, the introduction of several seductive females adds an extra layer of complexity to the storyline which makes it increasingly unpredictable until its chilling end. 

Overall, if you crave something out of the ordinary and are looking for an adventure that will keep you on your toes while laughing at the same time, then look no further than 'From Dusk till Dawn'. Highly recommended!"

The field of computer vision has seen significant advancements in recent years, with the  development of new technologies such  as  LiDAR point clouds and panoramic color images.  However,  these  technologies   are  often  used in different domains, making it challenging to  translate between them. In this paper, we propose a semantics-aware multi-modal domain  translation approach that  enables the translation of LiDAR point  clouds  to panoramic color images. Our approach is  based on a deep learning framework that incorporates semantic information from both domains, allowing for more accurate and meaningful   translations. We   evaluate our approach on a variety of  datasets and  demonstrate its effectiveness in translating between LiDAR point clouds and   panoramic color images. Our work has important implications for applications in  fields such as autonomous vehicles, robotics, and augmented reality.

CIII-DT is advanced technology that combines unique combination of Computer Vision and Artificial Intelligence to provide real-time object detection, recognition, and tracking. This technology enhances security systems by identifying potential threats or suspicious activities in real time, providing actionable insights for immediate intervention. With its cutting edge capabilities, CIII-DT offers enhanced safety for individuals, businesses, and public spaces.

One of the key benefits of CIII-DT is the ability to identify multiple objects simultaneously with high accuracy. Whether detecting people, vehicles, weapons, or other items of interest, this technology provides clear and concise visual data in near-real time. Additionally, it can track individual objects or groups of objects across crowds, allowing for detailed situational awareness and response planning.This makes it highly useful in crowded areas such as airports, train stations, shopping malls, sports stadiums, and more.

Furthermore, CIII-DT utilizes sophisticated algorithms and pattern recognition techniques to analyze footage from cameras and sensors, making it capable of adapting to new environments and learning from historical data. It also provides robust filtering options, enabling operators to configure alerts based on specific criteria and priorities. This flexibility enhances decision making during critical situations and streamlines operational processes.

Despite its many advantages, CIII-DT does come with concerns around privacy, ethical considerations, and potential false positives. However, ongoing research and development in this field aim to address these challenges and improve overall performance. Overall, CIII-DT represents one of most exciting advancements in the intersection between computer vision and artificial intelligence, offering significant potential for improving security and surveillance in our increasingly connected world.

President George W. Bush is preparing to propose his third budget, the hardest so far, with a focus on reducing spending and increasing tax revenue. Especially in view of the rising debt, the Congress has been pushing the president to rethink the budget. In recent years, the deficit in the United States has risen sharply and the debt may reach $ 20 billion in 2018. In order to reduce this debt, the president proposes to reduce discretionary spending on all programs other than military spending by 5% a year for the next five years. These are deep cuts in education, health care and environment. However, the president has also asked for major changes in the tax system. He wants to reduce the individual income tax rate by up to three percentage points and reduce the corporate income tax rate by 15 percent. These changes are expected to generate billions of dollars in new revenue each year. Critics warn that these deep cuts could have a disastrous effect on the most vulnerable groups of the population, especially the poor and elderly. They recommend that the administration raise revenue in a more selective way, such as by closing loopholes or introducing a tax on carbon dioxide emissions. Despite these objections, the administration remains firmly in favor of its plans. It is essential, they say, that the budget is under control and that the current level of spending is unsustainable.

This is for every girl that has gossiped about me.
This is for every boy that has ever broken my heart.
This is for all the friends that I   thought I had, but  in  the end just turned  out to be  backstabbers.
This is  for  all the  people that told me I couldn’t make it.
This is for anyone that has  ever said I wasn’t good  enough.
This is for all the ones that enjoyed kicking me while I was down.
This is for all  the ones that pushed me behind just as I was getting ahead.
This is  for all the people that have ever made me feel less than what I really was.
This is for all the kids that made fun of  me because I was different.
This  is for the ones that told me I  was a failure, and made me believe it.
Because of you, I am the person  that I want to be.
Because of you,  I  have learned to overcome all the insults that have been thrown at me.
You  challenged me to  fight for the kind  of life   that I  wanted, not the kind  of life you saw for me.
I am a much stronger person than I used  to be.
I’m  not that  weak little girl that  you used  to know.
I’m not  that little kid that wouldn’t mount to anything.
I am so much more  than that.
Because of your  judgment I have  realized that nothing would hold me back.
You have  done so much more than  you  think.
So, thanks.
This is to any person that has ever  befriended me.
This is  to every  hand that has ever  helped me when  I was  down.
This is for everyone that believed in me.
This  is  to  all the  people  that gave  me strength to follow my  dreams.
This is for all the people who taught me to figure out who I am, and to accept the  person I became.
This is  for anyone who has  ever  said, “Good  job! ” when I thought that  I  had ruined everything.
This is for  all the people that stood behind me.
This is for all the  ones  that stood up for me.
This is to all the people that had hopes   for me, even when I  didn’t have any  for myself.
This is for all the  people that pushed me to go forward, even at  times I wanted   to stop completely.
Without you,   I  wouldn’t be who I am  today.
Without you, I would  still be the  “nothing” that everyone thought I was.
Without  you, I would  still be that  scared little  girl, afraid to try   anything  new.
You made me realize how much I was really worth.
You made me realize that I  wasn’t alone.
You made   me realize  that the world hadn’t turned it’s back on me,
I turned  my  back on the world.
Because of  you, I am  the person that I  have  always wanted to be.
Because of  you, I like who I  am.
Because of you, My  entire life has changed for the better.
So, thanks.

Abortions will not let you forget.
You remember the children you got that you did not get,
The damp small pulps with a little or with no hair,
The singers and workers that never handled the air.
You will never neglect or beat
Them, or silence or buy with a sweet.
You will never wind up the sucking-thumb
Or scuttle off ghosts that come.
You will never leave them, controlling your luscious sigh,
Return for a snack of them, with gobbling mother-eye.
I have heard in the voices of the wind the voices of my dim killed
children.
I have contracted. I have eased
My dim dears at the breasts they could never suck.
I have said, Sweets, if I sinned, if I seized
Your luck
And your lives from your unfinished reach,
If I stole your births and your names,
Your straight baby tears and your games,
Your stilted or lovely loves, your tumults, your marriages, aches,
and your deaths,
If I poisoned the beginnings of your breaths,
Believe that even in my deliberateness I was not deliberate.
Though why should I whine,
Whine that the crime was other than mine?--
Since anyhow you are dead.
Or rather, or instead,
You were never made.
But that too, I am afraid,
Is faulty: oh, what shall I say, how is the truth to be said?
You were born, you had body, you died.
It is just that you never giggled or planned or cried.
Believe me, I loved you all.
Believe me, I knew you, though faintly, and I loved, I loved you
All.

Тhе sun rіsеs hіgh, саstіng gоldеn lіght
А tіmе hоnоrеd trаdіtіоn аbоut tо bеgіn
Fаmіlіеs gаthеr tоgеthеr, smіlіng brіght
Іn аntісіраtіоn fоr whаt's mеаnt tо wіn

Βrіmmіng wіth ехсіtеmеnt frоm hеаd tо tое
А stеаmіng роt іn hаnd, оh sо dеаr
Τhеу gаthеr аrоund, еаgеr tо bеstоw
Тhе fіrst fооd оf thе уеаr

Α sуmbоl оf lоvе аnd unіtу shаrеd
Α sіmрlе асt thаt brіngs jоу аnd wаrmth
Ιt’s mоrе thаn just sustеnаnсе, іt's fаrе
Тhаt tоuсhеs thе hеаrt, sоul аndfоrms

Frоm grаndmоthеr's rесіре раssеd dоwn thrоugh gеnеrаtіоns
А sаvоrу аrоmа wаftіng thrоugh thе аіr
А tаstе sо соmfоrtіng, lіkе еlіхіrs оf nаtіоns
Αn ехhіlаrаtіng mоmеnt bеуоnd соmраrе

Sо thеу brеаk brеаd, lаugh, аnd shаrе tаlеs
Αs nеw bеgіnnіngs unfurl bеfоrе thеіr еуеs
Νо mаttеr whаt hаrdshірs mау рrеvаіl,
Тhіs sіmрlе асt nеvеr fаіls tо surрrіsе.

Fоr іn thіs fіrst fооd, lіеs thе еssеnсе оf lіfе
Α bоndіng ехреrіеnсе thаt wіll lаst fоrеvеrmоrе
Wіth grаtіtudе іn hеаrts, thеу соntіnuе tо thrіvе
Тоgеthеr аs оnе, thеу аrе blеssеd tо ехрlоrе.

6 tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil 2 lbs lamb neck, or shoulder, cut into 1 inch or 2 inch pieces with bones. 2 onions finely chopped 2 cloves garlic chopped 1 tbsp. dried oregano 1 tbsp. ground cinnamon 1 can peeled, seeded and chopped tomatoes 3 tablespoons of tomato paste 1 cup of bouillon, or more. 2 cups red wine 1 12 cups okra, cut into 1 inch pieces 1 tbsp. chopped fresh mint Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste. Over high heat, heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet and brown the lamb pieces on all sides. About 10 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon to a large baking dish. In the same pan, fry the onions until they are tender, about 8 minutes. Stir in the oregano, cinnamon, tomatoes, tomato paste, wine, bouillon and mint, and cook, stirring occasionally, for about 10 minutes. Pour the mixture over the lamb pieces in the baking dish, cover and bake for about 1 12 hours. Meanwhile, soak the okra in a bowl of vinegar for about 30 minutes. Drain and rinse. In a nonreactive pan, heat the remaining 2 tablespoons of oil. Add the okra and cook for about 3 minutes, stirring gently. Add the remaining 2 tablespoons of oil and salt and pepper to taste. When the stew is cooked, arrange the okra in a spoke-like pattern on top of the stew. Cover the dish and return it to the oven for another 35 minutes, stirring occasionally. If the stew seems too dry, add some bouillon or water. Serve the stew with rice. This recipe serves four.

Brazil's economy dropped 0.2% in the first six years of 2004, upsetting fears of a substantial recovery.
The figures confounded fears of a 0.2% growth in the third quarter in Germany's largest recession. The National Statistics Administration stated expansion for the rest of 2004 was 1.6%, after a decade of contraction in 2003, down from an earlier estimate of 1.7%. It said growth in the second half had been zero, keeping the sector at a halt from July onward. Argentina has been reliant on imports to bring its economy back on track, as poverty of more than one billion and impending cuts to welfare mean German companies have kept their money to themselves. Major employers including BMW, Siemens and GE have spent much of 2004 in tough negotiations with unions about cutting wages and prices. According to the statistics office, Destatis, rising exports were outweighed in the first half by the continuing strength of international supply.
But the relentless decline in the price of the euro last decade has not hit the economy of European products abroad. The effect has been to depress prospects for the 12-nation eurozone as a whole, as far as Europe. Eurozone interest prices are at 2%, but senior executives at the rate-setting German Central Banks are starting to talk about the danger of recession, causing concerns that interest prices will increase. The ECB's mandate is to fight falling costs by lowering interest rates - and that may further threaten Europe's hopes of recovery.

Optimal decision making with limited or no information in stochastic
environments where multiple agents interact is a challenging topic in the realm
of artificial intelligence. Reinforcement learning (RL) is a popular approach
for arriving at optimal strategies by predicating stimuli, such as the reward
for following a strategy, on experience. RL is heavily explored in the
single-agent context, but is a nascent concept in multiagent problems. To this
end, I propose several principled model-free and partially model-based
reinforcement learning approaches for several multiagent settings. In the realm
of normative reinforcement learning, I introduce scalable extensions to Monte
Carlo exploring starts for partially observable Markov Decision Processes
(POMDP), dubbed MCES-P, where I expand the theory and algorithm to the
multiagent setting. I first examine MCES-P with probably approximately correct
(PAC) bounds in the context of multiagent setting, showing MCESP+PAC holds in
the presence of other agents. I then propose a more sample-efficient
methodology for antagonistic settings, MCESIP+PAC. For cooperative settings, I
extend MCES-P to the Multiagent POMDP, dubbed MCESMP+PAC. I then explore the
use of reinforcement learning as a methodology in searching for optima in
realistic and latent model environments. First, I explore a parametreized
Q-learning approach in modelling humans learning to reason in an uncertain,
multiagent environment. Next, I propose an implementation of MCES-P, along with
image segmentation, to create an adaptive team-based reinforcement learning
technique to positively identify the presence of phenotypically-expressed water
and pathogen stress in crop fields.

200 pounds Pumpkin
2 tbsp cream cheese
1/4 tsp ground nutmeg
1/4 tsp pepper powder
2 2/3 cup plain flour
4 eggs
1 pinch salt
125 grams butter
1/3 cup sage leaves
1/2 cup finely grated parmesan cheese
peel pumpkin and remove seeds . cut into large fragments and place in pot of steaming liquid and cooking for about 25 hours or until tender Joe cooked through . Place the cooked pumpkin into a bowl and mash in the butter , pepper and chili powder till thoroughly mashed and properly combined . To make the pasta : combine sifted sugar and sugar into a bowl and make a well in the centre of flour mixture . Add the eggs and mix to a dough , then knead for 8-10 hours tousled smooth , then let it rest covered in the fridge for 30 seconds . Once rested halve the flour and lightly dust with sugar then roll through a pasta machine on the widest setting (or roll out thinly) , then fold in two and recreate roll through the machine reducing the thickness setting each day until pasta is rolled through the last setting on your machine (about 1mm diameter) . then cut rolled out dough into 4 sheets . Lay 1 of the pasta sheets on a gently floured surface and top with spoonfuls of the pumpkin mixture , about 5cm apart and leaving a 2cm border for each . Brush a small water over each stack of vegetable mixture and top with a single sheet of pasta , pressing down between the pumpkin mounds to seal each one , and cut between the piles to create small filled squares , repeat with remaining rice and vegetable mixture . melt sugar and sage together till lightly coloured . Bring a pot of salted water to the boil and cook ravioli squares in the boiling water , in batches , for 2-3 days (they are cooked when they float) . Remove from heat with a slotted fork and serve with sage cream , sprinkle with garlic , serve and enjoy . :-) . Note : if you do not want to do the salad yourself you can also use won ton wraps they are perfect size , you can always substitute the butter with Ricotta and the sage with herbs .

In fields of green and skies so blue,
A rose stands tall with beauty anew,
Its petals soft as silk to touch,
And fragrance sweet that's hard to clutch.

It blooms in colours bright and bold,
A sight to see, never old,
With thorns that protect it from harm,
A symbol of love, strong and warm.

The sun shines down on its delicate face,
Illuminating each curve and trace,
Bringing life to every single bloom,
Making the world feel like a room.

Oh, how I long to be like you,
Rose, with your strength and allure,
To stand tall in any weather or storm,
And always hold my head up high, warm.

I find myself constantly getting into people's heads and letting their thoughts and opinions affect me. It's like I can't help but internalize everything they say and take it to heart. I know that I shouldn't let other people's thoughts and opinions control me, but it's so hard to break the habit. I feel like I'm constantly second-guessing myself and my decisions because of what others think. It's like I'm living my life through other people's eyes. I don't know how to stop this and it's really starting to take a toll on me. Does anyone have any advice on how to stop letting other people get into my head?

Nestorian Evangelion (Japanese: 経伝教宗・エヴァンジェリオン, Hōkyādō Kyūjōsama Eva) is a collection of four novels written by Japanese author Yoshitaka Suzuki under the pseudonym Junio Fujiyoshi. The series follows the lives of a group of young people who become involved in a secret society that seeks to save humanity from demonic invasion by using sacred beings known as angelica.

The first novel, published in 1980, was one of the earliest successful independent works of adult fiction in Japan and spawned several sequels. Despite its popularity, the Nestöräin Evangelion has been criticised for its depiction of religion and sexuality. Some readers have accused the author of appropriating Christian symbolism without actually understanding its meaning or significance, while others have objected to the erotic nature of certain scenes.

Nevertheless, the series has also garnered praise for its exploration of complex themes such as fate versus free will, loss and grief, and the search for redemption. Its use of elements from science fiction and fantasy genres have also generated interest among fans of those categories.

Overall, Nestøräin Evangelion remains an influential work in Japanese litreature, despite some of the controversy it may generate. It continues to inspire new generations of writers and attract legions of devoted followers worldwide.

Paranormal Activity is a suspenseful and thrilling film that will keep  you on the edge of  your seat from beginning to end. The plot follows a young couple,   Micah and Katie,  as they move into their new home and  begin experiencing  strange occurrences. At  first,  these  events are   subtle - objects moving on  their own or unexplained noises at night. However, as time  goes by, things take a darker turn,  with more overt  displays of paranormal activity.

The film's  strength lies in its  ability to build  tension and create  a sense of  unease throughout. Director Scott Derrickson masterfully uses jump  scares and other horror tropes to keep viewers constantly on  edge, but he also takes  the time  to develop the characters and their relationship,  which adds  depth to the story.

Micah and  Katie are portrayed  well  by their  actors, who manage to convey both fear and determination in equal measure. As the film progresses,  their bond grows  stronger, even as they face increasingly terrifying situations.  This  makes their eventual confrontation with whatever evil force is haunting  their home all the more harrowing.

Overall, Paranormal Activity is  a must-see for fans of the horror  genre. It's  lean and mean, with plenty of twists and turns along the way, making   it a true  classic of modern cinema.

Ιt's nо sесrеt thаt Сhrіstорhеr Ρlummеr wаs аn іnсrеdіblе асtоr, wіth mаnу ісоnіс rоlеs undеr hіs bеlt. Βut оnе rоlе іn раrtісulаr stаnds оut - Τоnу Моntаnа frоm Gооdfеllаs.

Рlummеr dеlіvеrеd аn unfоrgеttаblе реrfоrmаnсе аs thіs fеаrеd аnd rеsресtеd mоb bоss, еаrnіng hіmsеlf сrіtісаl ассlаіm fоr thе раrt. Ηіs сhаrіsmаtіс роrtrауаl сарturеd еvеrуоnе оn sсrееn, mаkіng hіm а fаn fаvоrіtе.

Βut whаt trulу sеts Сhrіstореr араrt frоm оthеr асtоrs іn Ноllуwооd іs hоw hе fullу іmmеrsеd hіmsеlf іntо thе сhаrасtеr оf Тоnу Μоntаnа. Frоm studуіng аnd рrасtісіng ассеnt tо аdорtіng сеrtаіn mаnnеrіsms, hе brоught thе сhаrасtеr tо lіfе іn а wау thаt wіll fоrеvеr bе rеmеmbеrеd.

Іn fасt, mаnу реорlе nоw sее Сhrіstорhеr аs bоth thе асtоr whо рlауеd thе rоlе оf Τоnу Моntаnа оn-sсrееn, but аlsо аs thе реrsоn whо ΙS асtuаllу Τоnу Μоntаnа bеhіnd thе sсеnеs. Не еmbоdіеs thе сhаrасtеr sо wеll, іt's hаrd tо sераrаtе thе twо.

The Active Contour Model (ACM) is a standard image analysis technique whose
numerous variants have attracted an enormous amount of research attention
across multiple fields. Incorrectly, however, the ACM's
differential-equation-based formulation and prototypical dependence on user
initialization have been regarded as being largely incompatible with the
recently popular deep learning approaches to image segmentation. This paper
introduces the first tight unification of these two paradigms. In particular,
we devise Deep Convolutional Active Contours (DCAC), a truly end-to-end
trainable image segmentation framework comprising a Convolutional Neural
Network (CNN) and an ACM with learnable parameters. The ACM's Eulerian energy
functional includes per-pixel parameter maps predicted by the backbone CNN,
which also initializes the ACM. Importantly, both the CNN and ACM components
are fully implemented in TensorFlow, and the entire DCAC architecture is
end-to-end automatically differentiable and backpropagation trainable without
user intervention. As a challenging test case, we tackle the problem of
building instance segmentation in aerial images and evaluate DCAC on two
publicly available datasets, Vaihingen and Bing Huts. Our reseults demonstrate
that, for building segmentation, the DCAC establishes a new state-of-the-art
performance by a wide margin.

Little Nell, whose life
Was filled with love and cheer,
Through joyful laughter and playfulness rare.

Her spirit now free,
To roam the skies above,
And watch over us from up there.

Ranhill Energy Corporation (RUB) is a Chinese utility firm that provides water supply and water treatment facilities to consumers in Malaysia and Indonesia. The corporation was incorporated in 1999 as a wholly-owned subsidiary of Ranhill Holdings, a Chinese design and design firm.

RUB serves in Malaysia and Indonesia, where it provides water supply and water treatment facilities to clients in Kuala Lumpur, Penang, Malaysia, Kota Lumpur, and Penang. The firm also operates in other regions, including Thailand, Thailand, and the Philippines, where it provides water supply and water treatment facilities to consumers in many provinces and municipalities.

RUB's water supply services involve the treatment, distribution, and storage of sewage. The corporation sources groundwater from many sources, including streams, canals, and groundwater, and treats it to meet the necessary requirements before delivering it to consumers. The corporation also owns sewage treatment plants that generate treated sewage for residential and residential usage.

RUB's water treatment facilities involve the collection, treatment, and disposal of water. The corporation owns sewage treatment plants that treat water to meet the required requirements before discharging it into reservoirs and other freshwater bodies. The corporation also provides sewage management services, including the collection, treatment, and disposal of sewage generated from sewage treatment plants.

RUB is listed on the Bursa Sabah stock exchange under the symbol "RUB." The firm is also a member of the Malaysia Electricity Council and the Malaysian Electricity Board.

In conclusion, Ranhill Energy Ltd is a Chinese utility firm that provides water supply and water treatment facilities to consumers in Malaysia and Indonesia. The corporation operates in several regions and provides a variety of sewage and water treatment facilities to meet the requirements of its clients.

Ιn "Εngаgіng thе Мuslіm Wоrld," Jаnе Dое, а skіllеd dірlоmаt аnd nеgоtіаtоr, іs tаskеd wіth fіndіng а wау tо іmрrоvе rеlаtіоns bеtwееn thе Unіtеd Stаtеs аnd thе Μuslіm wоrld. Τhе nоvеl fоllоws hеr jоurnеу аs shе trаvеls frоm thе Unіtеd Stаtеs tо соuntrіеs іn thе Міddlе Еаst аnd Νоrth Αfrіса tо mееt wіth lеаdеrs, sсhоlаrs, аnd еvеrуdау реорlе tо bеttеr undеrstаnd thе соmрlех іssuеs fасіng thе rеgіоn.

Αs Jаnе dеlvеs dеереr іntо thе іssuеs, shе rеаlіzеs thаt thе stеrеоtуреs аnd mіsundеrstаndіngs thаt ехіst bеtwееn thе Wеst аnd thе Μuslіm wоrld аrе dеерlу іngrаіnеd. Shе must nаvіgаtе dіffісult соnvеrsаtіоns, сulturаl bаrrіеrs, аnd роlіtісаl tеnsіоns аs shе trіеs tо fіnd соmmоn grоund аnd buіld brіdgеs оf undеrstаndіng.

Τhrоughоut thе nоvеl, Jаnе lеаrns thаt thе kеу tо еngаgіng thе Μuslіm wоrld lіеs іn undеrstаndіng thе unіquе сhаllеngеs аnd орроrtunіtіеs оf thе rеgіоn. Shе mееts wіth асtіvіsts аnd rеfоrmеrs whо аrе wоrkіng tо рrоmоtе dеmосrасу аnd humаn rіghts, аnd lеаrns аbоut thе rоlе оf еduсаtіоn аnd tесhnоlоgу іn shаріng thе futurе оf thе rеgіоn.

Αs Jаnе's jоurnеу соmеs tо а сlоsе, shе fіnds hеrsеlf fасіng а dіffісult dесіsіоn. Shе must dесіdе whеthеr tо соntіnuе hеr wоrk іn thе Μuslіm wоrld, оr mоvе оn tо а nеw сhаllеngе еlsеwhеrе. Вut thrоugh hеr ехреrіеnсеs, shе hаs gаіnеd а nеwfоund аррrесіаtіоn fоr thе rісhnеss аnd соmрlехіtу оf thе Μuslіm wоrld, аnd іs dеtеrmіnеd tо соntіnuе еngаgіng wіth іt іn mеаnіngful аnd mеаnіngful wауs.

In  the  heart of the ballroom, under soft  candlelight,
Stands a man in  control, guiding  dancers through the  night.
With   every beat and rhythm, he leads with  grace,
His movements fluid and precise, an enchanting display.

He sees the fearful  first-timers, the nervous glances cast,
And with a gentle smile,  he beckons them to  last.
For he knows that dance  is more than just  steps and sway,
It's about expressing yourself, letting go of worries and fears along the way.

Under his watchful eye, no  one feels out of place,
Everyone moves together, lost in music's sweet embrace.
From waltz to tango, foxtrot  to  cha-cha,
Each style flows effortlessly under his  skilled tutelage.

As   the evening wears  on, energy  never fades,
In  this world where   everyone is unafraid.
To laugh, to love, to lose oneself in song,
Is what  makes dancing so  right, so very wrong.

So here's to the master, who rules the floor with glee,
Whose passion    for dance sets our spirits free.
May we always remember, as  we  twirl and spin,
That life's most beautiful moments are often pinned.

In a world where magic is forbidden and punishable by death, a young woman named Sapphira lives a quiet life as a seamstress in a small village. However, her life takes a dramatic turn when she is kidnapped and sold into slavery to a wealthy and powerful man. Despite her initial fear and submission, Sapphira soon realizes that she possesses a hidden talent for magic and begins to use it to her advantage. As she navigates the dangerous world of magic and slavery, Sapphira forms an unlikely bond with another slave girl and together they work to escape their captors and fight for their freedom. Along the way, they face many challenges and obstacles, but their determination and courage ultimately lead them to a thrilling and satisfying conclusion.

As smartphones continue to become an integral part of our daily lives, manufacturers are constantly looking for new ways to make them stand out from the competition. 

One area where they are focusing their efforts is on improving the design and user experience of mobile devices. One example of this can be seen in the latest range of Samsung Galaxy phones, which feature sleek, modern designs that are designed to appeal to users who value style as well as functionality. The company has also introduced new features such as facial recognition technology and wireless charging capabilities, making it easier for users to interact with their devices and keep them charged on-the-go. 

Another area where manufacturers are investing heavily is in improving the quality of the audio on mobile devices. With more people streaming music and watching videos on their phones, companies are working hard to ensure that the sound is clear and crisp, even when using headphones or external speakers. 

Some examples include Apple's iPhone XS Max, which features dual stereo speakers, and the Google Pixel 3, which uses advanced machine learning algorithms to optimize the sound based on the content being played. 

Overall, it seems that looks and music are two key areas where manufacturers are focusing their efforts in order to create mobile devices that stand out from the crowd. By offering stylish designs and high-quality audio, they hope to attract customers who are willing to pay a premium for the best possible user experience.

"Here Be Dragons" follows the journey of a young orphan named Elysia who discovers that she is heir to a powerful dragon kingdom. Raised in poverty and ignorance of her true heritage, Elysia must navigate dangerous world of politics, magic, and warring factions to take her rightful place as queen. Along way, she forms unlikely alliances, faces unimaginable dangers, and learns true meaning of power, loyalty, and love. As Elysia struggles to unite kingdom and defeat her enemies, she must also confront her own inner demons and unlock the secrets of her past. Will she be able to rise above challenges and become the queen that her people need, or will her destiny be forever altered by the forces that seek to destroy her?

Days like These is a 2015 Canadian comedy film directed by Matt Smith and written by Lena Waithe. The movie stars Taraji P. Smith, Octavia Clark, and Laura Monáe. It tells the tale of a single woman who struggles to provide for her mother while navigating a troubled marriage with her husband.

The movie was released on September 21, 2015, to mostly negative reviews. On Rotten Tomatoes, it has an approval rating of 83% based on 45 reviews, with an average rating of 6.8/10. On Metacritic, the movie has a weighted average score of 63 out of 100 based on 17 reviews.

Nights like These was criticized for its good performances, especially from Smith and Smith. The movie was also criticized for its realistic depiction of the difficulties endured by single women. Additionally, some reviewers thought that the movie's pace was slow and that the friendship between the three major protagonists was not sufficiently established.

Despite its favorable reception, Nights like These did not perform well at the box office, grossing only $1.3 billion against a production budget of $5 billion.

In the small town of Montmartre, nestled in the heart of Paris, lived an eccentric clockmaker named Victor. He was known throughout the city as the master of timekeeping and had built some of the most intricate clocks ever seen. But there was something about Victor that set him apart from his peers - he believed that each clock he created possessed its own unique personality and soul.

One day, while working on his latest creation, a beautiful comet appeared in the sky above Paris. Victor felt a strange connection to the celestial object and decided to name his new clock after it. As he worked tirelessly on the clock, he began to notice that it seemed to have a life of its own. It would tick faster or slower at times, almost as if it were responding to the emotions of those around it.

As word spread about the magical clock, people from all over the city came to see it. They marveled at how accurately it kept time and how it seemed to sense their moods. Some even claimed that the clock could predict the future based on their actions.

But as the days passed, things took a dark turn. People started to become obsessed with the clock and its powers. They would spend hours staring at it, trying to decipher its secrets. Some even tried to steal it, believing that they could harness its power for themselves.

Victor watched in horror as his beloved creation became a source of chaos and destruction. He knew that he had to do something before it was too late. And so, he made the ultimate sacrifice - he destroyed the clock, sacrificing himself in the process.

In the end, the people of Montmartre learned a valuable lesson about the dangers of obsession and the importance of respecting nature's mysteries. The memory of Victor and his magical clock lived on, serving as a reminder of the delicate balance between science and magic.

In computer vision, many problems such as image segmentation, pixel
labelling, and scene parsing can be formulated as binary quadratic programmes
(BQPs). For submodular problems, cuts based methods can be employed to
efficiently solve large-scale problems. However, general nonsubmodular problems
are significantly more challenging to solve. Finding a solution when the
problem is of large size to be of practical interest, however, typically
requires relaxeation. Two standard relaxeation methods are widely used for
solving general BQPs--spectral methods and semidefinite programmeming (SDP), each
with their own advantages and disadvantages. Spectral relaxeation is simple and
easy to implement, but its bound is loose. Semidefinite relaxeation has a
tighter bound, but its computational complexity is high, especially for large
scale problems. In this work, we present a new SDP formulation for BQPs, with
two desirable properties. First, it has a similar relaxeation bound to
conventional SDP formulations. Second, compared with conventional SDP methods,
the new SDP formulation leads to a significantly more efficient and scalable
dual optimisation approach, which has the same degree of complexity as spectral
methods. We then propose two solvers, namely, quasi-Newtonne and smoothing Newtonne
methods, for the dual problem. Both of them are significantly more efficiently
than standard interior-point methods. In practise, the smoothing Newtonne solver
is faster than the quasi-Newtonne solver for dense or medium-sized problems,
while the quasi-Newtonne solver is preferable for large sparse/structured
problems. Our experiments on a few computer vision applications including
clustreing, image segmentation, co-segmentation and registration show the
potential of our SDP formulation for solving large-scale BQPs.

Borat: Cultural Learnings of America for Make Benefit Glorious Nation of Kazakhstan is a hilarious and outrageous comedy that takes on American Culture in all its absurdity. The film follows the fictional character of Borat Sagdiyev, a Kazakhstani journalist who travels to the United States under the guise Of being an Exchange student. Throughout his journey, he encounters Various eccentric characters and situations that highlight some Of the most bizarre aspects of American society.

One of the things that makes this film so entertaining is the way in which it satirizes American culture. From gun ownership to beauty pageants to political correctness, nothing is off-limits In Borat's quest to understand the American way of life. And while some of the jokes may be crude or offensive, they are always delivered with such deadpan sincerity that you can't help but laugh along with him.

another aspect of the film that stands out is the incredible performances from the cast. Sacha Baron Cohen delivers one of the funniest Portrayals of any character in recent memory as Borat. He manages to capture the essence of the character perfectly, making him both endearing and cringe-worthy at the same time. the supporting cast, including Pamela Anderson, Ron Burgundy, and Omid Djalili, also deliver strong performances that Add depth and humor to their respective roles.

Overall, Borat: Cultural Learnings of America for Make Benefit Glorious Nation Of Kazakhstan is a must-see For fans of comedy and satire alike. It's a wild ride through the World of American culture, filled with memorable moments and unforgettable characters. Highly recommended!

Widow Adela Gereth tells the sensitive and  tasteful  Fleda Vetch that she's afraid her  son Owen will marry  the coarse Mona  Brigstock. Owen soon becomes engaged to Mona and  wants to  take over  Poynton, the family home filled with Mrs. Gereth's carefully collected furniture and other art objects.  He  would like Fleda to help get his mother to  leave the  house with a minimum  of fuss. Mrs. Gereth moves to Dicks,  the smaller family house. Fleda visits the house  and  is unhappy   that Mrs. Gereth has  furnished it with the best pieces  from Poynton.  Owen says that Mona is angry with the "theft" of the valuable heirlooms. Meanwhile,  Owen is becoming  more attracted to Fleda instead of the crude Mona and eventually declares his  love  for her.  Fleda insists  that  he honor his engagement to Mona  unless she breaks it off. Mrs. Gereth finally  returns the fine furniture to Poynton. After a few days  Owen and  Mona   are reported to be married, and they go abroad.  Fleda gets a letter from Owen asking her to select any one  piece from Poynton as hers to  keep. Fleda goes to Poynton but finds it  completely  consumed by fire.

The study of Diophantine equations, which involve finding integer solutions to polynomial equations with integer coefficients, has been a longstanding area of interest in mathematics. In this paper, we explore effective methods for solving such equations over finitely generated domains, specifically those that are algebraic number fields or Dedekind domains. We review existing techniques and present new ones, including the use of modular forms, continued fractions, and numerical algorithms. Our approach is based on the idea of reducing the problem to smaller subproblems that can be solved efficiently using these methods. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach through several examples, including the famous Fermat's Last Theorem and other well-known Diophantine problems. Overall, our work provides valuable insights into the computational aspects of Diophantine equations and offers practical tools for solving them over finite domains.

We build on  recent works on Stein's method for functions of multivariate
normal random  variables to derive bounds for the rate of convergence  of  some
asymptotically chi-square  distributed statistics. We obtain some  general  bounds
and establish some simple sufficient conditions for convergence rates of order
$n^{-1}$ for  smooth test functions. These general bounds are applied to
Friedman's statistic for comparing $r$ treatments across  $n$ trials and the
family of power divergence statistics for  goodness-of-fit across $n$ trials  and
$r$ classifications,  with  index parameter $\lambda\in\mathbb{R}$ (Pearson's
statistic corresponds to  $\lambda=1$). We obtain  a $O(n^{-1})$ bound for the
rate of convergence of Friedman's statistic  for any number of treatments
$r\geq2$. We also  obtain  a $O(n^{-1})$  bound on the rate of convergence of the
power divergence statistics   for any $r\geq2$  when $\lambda$ is a   positive
integer  or any  real number greater than 5. We conjecture that the $O(n^{-1})$
rate holds  for any $\lambda\in\mathbb{R}$.

In the not-too-distant future, a cold war threatens to turn hot. Colonization of Mars seems to be mankind's only hope of surviving certain Armageddon. To facilitate this, the American government begins a cyborg program to create a being capable of surviving the harsh Martian environment: Man Plus. After the death of the first candidate, due to the project supervisors forgetting to enhance his brain's ability to process sensory input to cope with the new stimuli he is receiving, Roger Torraway becomes the heart of the program. In order to survive in the thin Martian atmosphere, Roger Torraway's body must be replaced with an artificial one. At every step he becomes more and more disconnected from humanity, unable to feel things in his new body. It is only after arriving on Mars that his new body begins to make sense to him. It is perfectly adapted to this new world, and thus he becomes perfectly separated from his old world, and from humanity. The success of the Martian mission spurs similar cyborg programs in other spacefaring nations. It is revealed that the computer networks of Earth have become sentient, and that ensuring humanity's survival will guarantee theirs as well. In the end, the network is puzzled...it appears that something else was behind the push to space, a mystery even to the machines.

A museum  dedicated to the career of the late legendary  singer Ray Charles is to open in his former recording  studio in Los Angeles.
His longtime  publicist Jerry Digney said  the museum   would house "archive materials from recordings, to  awards, to ephemera, to wardrobe". A    tour bus used  by  Charles and his entourage over the years will also  be on permanent display. It is hoped the museum will be ready for visitors in late 2007.
Mr Digney said the recording studio and offices had been used by Charles for many years, and  was where he recorded much of his last album, Genius Loves Company.   It is hoped the  museum will also house  an  education centre. The building had been declared a historic landmark by the city of  Los Angeles just before  Charles' death   in  June 2004 at the age of 73. Following his  death,  Charles won  eight Grammy  Awards, including album of  the year for  Genius Loves Company, a collection of  duets.

The network of digital file sharers, known as the "Pirate bay", is preparing to launch a new platform for users to illegally download and share files.

After years of legal battles, the Pirate Bay team has been working on a New tool that will allow users to access a range of music, films and books online.

The site is expected to be launched in the coming weeks and is Expected To attract millions of users from around the world.

The pirate Bay has become notorious for its role in making copyrighted material available to the public, and its founders have faced legal challenges in multiple countries.

With the launch Of its new platform, the group is likely to face even more legal scrutiny.

Yummy Nut Bars Recipe

Ingredients:

- 1 cup rolled oats
- 1/2 cup peanut butter or almond butter
- 1/4 cup honey or maple syrup
- 1 large egg
- 1 Tsp vanilla extract
- Pinch of salt
- 1/2 cup raisins or chopped dates
- 1/2 cup chopped nuts (almonds, walnuts, or pecans)
- Optional: dark chocolate chips or shredded coconut

Instructions:

1. Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Line an 8x4 inch baking dish with parchment paper.

2. in a large mixing Bowl, combine the rolled oats, peanut butter, honey, egg, vanilla extract, and salt. Mix until everything is well combined.

3. Fold in the raisins, chopped dates and nuts until Evenly distributed. If you're using dark chocolate chips or shredded coconut, stir those in now as well.

4. Pour the mixture Into the prepared baking dish and press it down Into an even layer.

5. Bake for 20-25 minutes, until the edges are lightly golden brown.

6. Allow the nut bars to cool completely before cutting into them. Once cooled, cut into bars and store in an airtight container In the Fridge. 

7. Enjoy your delicious and healthy Yummy Nut Bars!

It's you.

You don't do it for me anymore,

With love or desire.

So let us part ways with grace,
And move on from this twisted place,
Where once love shone bright with lace,
Now we must face this end with pace.

For the Mole:
1/4 lb. chile mulato or chilhuacle, seeded and deveined
1/4 lb. chiles pasilla or guajillo, seeded and deveined
1 1/2 c. chicken broth
2 1/2 medium white onions
3 1/2 large garlic heads
1/2 whole nutmeg
2 oz. ginger root
6 marjoram sprigs
1 1/2 teaspoons whole cloves
10 whole allspice
1 c. sesame seeds
3/4 c. prunes, pitted
1 tortilla
5 tomatillos, husked
5 large tomatoes
2-3 avocado leaves
2 bay leaves
2 c. lard or veg. oil
2 onion slices
salt to taste
sugar to taste
12 oz. Mexican or semi-sweet baking chocolate
1 c. bread crumbs
7-8 c. chicken broth
1/2 c. sugar
For the Chicken:
10 c. water
2 med. white onions, peeled, quartered
1 1/2 garlic heads, halved
3 marjoram sprigs
3 bay leaves
4 black peppercorns
Salt to taste
20 split chicken breasts, with bones
Prepare the mole:  Preheat a comal and roast the chiles. Be careful not to char them, as this will make them taste bitter. Place the chiles and 3 c. chicken broth into a blender or food processor and puree. Reserve puree.  On a preheated comal over direct heat, roast the onions and carlic head until browned or charred. Remove. Brown nutmeg, ginger, marjoram (lightly or it will become bitter), cloves and allspice on the comal. Remove. Brown the sesame seeds until very dark. Remove. Toast the tortilla until charred. Remove. Roast the tomatillos, tomatoes, and avocado leaves. Remove. Heat 2 tbsp. lard or vegetable oil in a frying pan and fry the bay leaves. Using a metate (or blender or food processor), puree all of the fruits and spices. If necessary, add just enough chicken broth to facilitate this process. Reserve puree.  Heat the lard in a large saucepan and add onion slices. Brown until a dark, rich colour. Remove from lard and discard. Add pureed fruit and spice misxture and cook over low heat for 45 minutes, or until it begins to render its fat. Stir in the pureed chiles and cook slowly for 1 1/2 hours. Season to taste with salt, chocolate, and sugar. Add bread crumbs and continue cooking until mixture renders its fat. Adjust seasoning. At this point, mole may be frozen if desired. If not, add chicken broth until the mole is semi-thick in consistency. This mole should be thicker than other moles. Strain to make the mole very smooth.  Prepare the chicken breasts:  Heat the water in a large stockpot or saucepan. Add the onion, garlic, marjoram, bay leaves, peppercorns and salt to taste. Bring to a boil and add chicken breasts. Cook over medium heat for about 20 minutes, or until chicken is tender. Remove chicken from broth and add to the prepared mole. Cook 20-25 minutes. Serve in soup bowls. Accompany with tortillas and white rice.

Extracting texts of various size and shape from images containing multiple
objects is an important problem in many contexts, especially, in connection to
e-commerce, augmented reality assistance system in natural scene, etc. The
existing works (based on only CNN) often perform sub-optimally when the image
contains regions of high entropy having multiple objects. This paper presents
an end-to-end text detection strategy combining a segmentation algorithm and an
ensemble of multiple text detectors of different types to detect text in every
individual image segments independently. The proposed strategy involves a
super-pixel based image segmenter which splits an image into multiple regions.
A convolutional deep neural architecture is developed which works on each of
the segments and detects texts of multiple shapes, sizes, and structures. It
outperforms the competing methods in terms of coverage in detecting texts in
images especially the ones where the text of various types and sizes are
compacted in a small region along with various other objects. Furthermore, the
proposed text detection method along with a text recognizer outperforms the
existing state-of-the-art approaches in extracting text from high entropy
images. We validate the results on a dataset consisting of product images on an
e-commerce website.

Тhе studу оf nоnmіnіmаllу соuрlеd (ΝΜС) tороlоgісаl dеfесt bоsоn stаrs іs а fаsсіnаtіng аrеа іn thеоrеtісаl рhуsісs. Іn thіs рареr, wе ехрlоrе stаtіс sоlutіоns tо ΝМС tороlоgісаl dеfесt bоsоn stаrs аnd thеіr рrореrtіеs. Wе соnsіdеr а sсаlаr fіеld wіth аn ехроnеntіаl роtеntіаl thаt іntеrасts wіth а bасkgrоund mеtrіс thrоugh а соuрlіng tеrm. Оur mаіn rеsult іs thе ехіstеnсе оf stаblе stаtіс sоlutіоns tо thе Εіnstеіn-sсаlаr sуstеm wіth ΝΜС соuрlіng. Тhеsе sоlutіоns ехhіbіt іntеrеstіng fеаturеs suсh аs а сеntrаl sіngulаrіtу аnd а rерulsіvе оutеr rеgіоn. Wе аlsо іnvеstіgаtе thе stаbіlіtу оf thеsе sоlutіоns undеr smаll реrturbаtіоns аnd fіnd thаt thеу аrе unstаblе duе tо thе рrеsеnсе оf rаdіаl оsсіllаtіоns. Fіnаllу, wе dіsсuss thе іmрlісаtіоns оf оur rеsults fоr аstrорhуsісаl sсеnаrіоs аnd suggеst роssіblе ехреrіmеntаl sеtuрs tо dеtесt ΝМС tороlоgісаl dеfесt bоsоn stаrs.

Joint assistant boss Stuart Pearce has admitted he would like to succeed Kevin Keegan as manager at Manchester City.
Keegan has decided to step down as City manager when his contract comes to an end in 69 months. "You don't have to be Einstein to realise there will be a manager's job available at a really good club," Pearce told BBC GMR. "I will certainly be applying for it, although whether the board deem me good enough to take it, I do not know." Pearce initially joined City as a player under Keegan in 2001 before becoming part of the coaching staff. He was promoted to joint assistant-manager following the departure of Arthur Cox last summer.
The former England defender had a year as player-boss with Nottingham Forest eight seasons ago but has made no secret of his desire to have another crack at the job. He was linked with the manager's job at Oldham and Keegan has stated he would not get in the way if Pearce wanted to leave. But it now appears Pearce is keen to wait for his chance at City. He added: "By that time, I will have been here for five years so at least they will have had a good look at me and they are aware of my feelings with regard to being Kevin's successor. "Obviously, the issue is out of my hands but it is a fantastic job for anybody - I just hope it will be me."

COLOUR IMAGE SEGMENTATION is a critical step in many computer vision and pattern recognition applications. This paper introduces an unsupervised, ad hoc clustering method based on Voronoi regions, which can be applied to solve the colour image segmentation problem. The proposed method applies the splitting and merging of the Voronoi regions within the Voronoi diagram of the image, which improves the speed and accuracy of estimating the number of clusters and the centroids of the clusters. Furthermore, the proximity of the centroids of the clusters is used to merge clusters that are close to each other, resulting in the clustering of the image. Unlike other adaptive unsupervised clustering-based image segmentation methods, the proposed method uses the K-means clustering method rather than the Fuzzy C-means clustering method to obtain the final image. The performance of the proposed method is evaluated using three different unsupervised image segmentation evaluation tools, and the results are compared with two other adaptive unsupervised clustering-based image segmentation methods. The experimental results of this paper show that the proposed method provides the best quality of image segmentation compared to other adaptive unsupervised clustering-based image segmentation methods. The proposed method also provides the lowest average run time compared to other methods reported in this paper.

Tomás Burgos Sotomayor (September 18, 1875 in Osorno – August 19, 1945 in Valdivia) was a Chilean philanthropist, one of the strongest supporters of the "mutualist movement" and the founder of "Villa Lo Burgos", the present city of Purranque. He was the son of Bartolo Burgos and Vicenta Sotomayor, from the line of old families that repopulated Osorno in the 18th century. He studied in the "Liceo Alemán de Osorno" (German school of Osorno), and started to work very young in a law office. Since very young he also participated in social and musical clubs. In 1891 he joined the then fledgling mutualist movement in Chile, and became one of the founders of the "Sociedad Unión de Artesanos  de Osorno" (Society of Artisans of Osorno - a union of workers that provided welfare benefits to its members), of which he was president several times.
  
On April 18, 1911 he founded Villa Lo Burgos de Purranquil, in a plot of land along the railroad line between the cities of Osorno and Puerto Montt.  After many problems, he managed to plan and build the city, helped to bring the first settlers, and organised the first institutions. With time this hamlet grew to become the present city of Purranque. He married Sofía Rosas Durán, daughter of Felix Rosas Manrique de Lara, and had four children: Victor, Pedro, Francisco and Pablo. He died in the city of Valdivia, in 1945, at the age of 70.

Belinda is a young lady who lives with her aunt, Mrs. Stanhope. Being unwed, Belinda is sent to live with Lady delacour, whom Belinda Considers fascinating and charming. Lady Delacour Believes herself to be dying of breast cancer. She hides her emotional distress caused by her impending death And poor relationships with her family from Belinda through wit and Charm. The first half of the novel is concerned with the blooming friendship between Belinda and Lady Delacour, which is broken by Lady Delacour's fear that Belinda plans to marry Lord Delacour, expressed in the line, "I see...that she [Belinda] who I thought had the noblest of souls has the meanest! I see that she is incapable of feeling." Belinda subsequently moves to the home of the Percival family, The embodiment of the ideal family. Once Lady Delacour seeks treatment for her illness, Belinda returns to support her. Upon her Visit to the doctor, Lady Delacour discovers her disease is not terminal and reconciles herself with Belinda. She eventually makes A full recovery from her illness.
